What visitors remember

Brand System

Plan system

FAQ

Questions that stop generic websites.

The system forces specificity before visual polish.

Does this replace a designer?

No. It gives an AI agent a stronger design process so the first artifact is more useful.

Can the same template create different sites?

Yes. Structure is stable, but style pack decisions change typography, sections, proof, and component behavior.

What makes it website-specific?

It prioritizes visitor story, proof, conversion, and brand memory before visual decoration.

How do I extend it?

Add new website sections, aesthetic directions, or style packs without rewriting the core skill.

No fixed theme lock-in

Design the website before you decorate it.

Generate a style pack, section strategy, and HTML page that all point at the same visitor story.

Preview website system
Signal Edition

A website-first HTML design skill for section-level style systems.
